industry: SBIC GP — Lower-middle-market PE (manufacturing & business services)
asking_price: not for sale — no asking price
summary: Wayne PA. Founded 1990. $3.1B AUM (PE + RE + credit + secondaries). Six SBICs pursued over 27+ years, most recent licensed 2021. LMM PE in U.S. manufacturing and business services ($3-10M EBITDA). Family/founder-led businesses, often in LMI areas/HUBZones. Track record: revenue +56% by year 3, +44% job creation. SEC-registered RIA. SBA-recognized 2024 SBIC of the Year.
fit_note: Established, multi-billion-AUM platform — SBIC of the Year — high-quality but high-cost target
